title: frontend: ObjectEventList: Fix Age column text clipping in details panel
author: Swastik19Nit

findings.description: MUI v5 sx array merging correctly handles undefined, object, and array forms of labelProps.sx.
overflowWrap: 'anywhere' is more appropriate than break-word for timestamp strings that lack natural break points.
New mock event with source.component field validates the source-guard logic from PR #5824.
